title: platanthera bifolia var. graciliflora
intro: Platanthera bifolia var. graciliflora, also known as the lesser butterfly orchid or green leaved lesser butterfly orchid, is a variety of the lesser butterfly orchid plant. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of menopause. The health benefits of Platanthera bifolia var. graciliflora include reducing inflammation, acting as an expectorant, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
